DB.description: D1 database for users, sessions, list metadata, and sync records.

LISTS_KV.description: KV namespace used as the fallback store for rate-limit counters.

LISTS_R2.description: R2 bucket for compiled raw allowlist and blocklist artifacts.

RATE_LIMIT_COUNTER.description: Durable Object binding for atomic request rate limiting.

SYNC_QUEUE.description: Queue for background external source sync jobs.

APP_ORIGIN.description: Public frontend origin for CORS and generated URLs, for example `https://your-domain.example`.

GITHUB_OAUTH_REDIRECT_URI.description: GitHub OAuth callback URL, usually `<APP_ORIGIN>/api/auth/github/callback` for same-origin deployments.

SESSION_SECRET.description: Generate a long random value, for example with `openssl rand -hex 32`.

GITHUB_CLIENT_ID.description: Client ID from your GitHub OAuth app.

GITHUB_CLIENT_SECRET.description: Client secret from your GitHub OAuth app.
